name: Pumpkin and Raisin Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 teaspoons Red Star Active Dry Yeast
3 cups Bread flour + 3 tablespoons (see note below)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your bread machine according to the manufacturer's guidelines.
2. Mix the pumpkin, water, and butter in a glass mixing bowl. Microwave on high for approximately 60 seconds, testing that the liquid is warm to the touch.
3. If necessary, add more flour (1 teaspoon at a time) before adding ingredients to the bread pan as per the manufacturer's instructions.
4. Add all ingredients to the bread machine pan according to the manufacturer's directions.
5. About 5 minutes into the mixing cycle, check if the dough is too sticky. If so, add additional flour one teaspoon at a time.
6. After the rest cycle begins and kneading resumes, check again for texture (the dough will be slightly sticky).
7. Add raisins about 12 minutes into the cycle (adding them just before the beep on some machines can cause them to settle at the bottom of the pan).
8. Bake using the "mix bread" cycle with the light crust setting.
9. Depending on humidity, add up to 1 teaspoon of additional flour as needed.
This recipe yields a soft, fluffy loaf that tastes like pumpkin pie and raisins.
